title: Part 1a: Bulk Select & Delete across all portal sections

requirements.summary: Add individual record selection checkboxes to each row in all five portal list pages
acceptanceCriteria: Each row in MembershipsPage, PublishingWorksPage, ReleasesPage, RecordingProjectsPage, and ArtistDevelopmentPage has a checkbox on the left side.
Checking a row's checkbox marks it as selected with a visible highlight.
Unchecking removes the selection highlight.

file_operations.description: Add checkbox column to the left of each membership row. Implement local selection state using useState to track selected membership IDs. Apply visual highlight styling (e.g., bg-muted) to selected rows.
Add checkbox column to the left of each publishing work row. Implement local selection state using useState to track selected work IDs. Apply visual highlight styling to selected rows.
Add checkbox column to the left of each release row. Implement local selection state using useState to track selected release IDs. Apply visual highlight styling to selected rows.
Add checkbox column to the left of each recording project row. Implement local selection state using useState to track selected project IDs. Apply visual highlight styling to selected rows.

Add checkbox column to the left of each artist development row. Implement local selection state using useState to track selected artist development IDs. Apply visual highlight styling to selected rows.

requirements.summary: Add 'Select All' checkbox in table headers with toggle and indeterminate state support
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Select All' checkbox appears in the header row of each portal list table.
Clicking it selects all visible rows.
Clicking it again (when all are selected) deselects all rows.
The checkbox shows an indeterminate state when some but not all rows are selected.

file_operations.description: Add 'Select All' checkbox to the table header row. Implement toggle logic: if all visible memberships are selected, clicking deselects all; otherwise, clicking selects all. Use the indeterminate property when some (but not all) rows are selected.

Add 'Select All' checkbox to the table header row. Implement toggle logic: if all visible works are selected, clicking deselects all; otherwise, clicking selects all. Use the indeterminate property when some (but not all) rows are selected.

Add 'Select All' checkbox to the table header row. Implement toggle logic: if all visible releases are selected, clicking deselects all; otherwise, clicking selects all. Use the indeterminate property when some (but not all) rows are selected.

Add 'Select All' checkbox to the table header row. Implement toggle logic: if all visible projects are selected, clicking deselects all; otherwise, clicking selects all. Use the indeterminate property when some (but not all) rows are selected.

Add 'Select All' checkbox to the table header row. Implement toggle logic: if all visible entries are selected, clicking deselects all; otherwise, clicking selects all. Use the indeterminate property when some (but not all) rows are selected.

requirements.summary: Display conditional 'Delete Selected' bulk action button showing count of selected records
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Delete Selected' button is not visible when no checkboxes are checked.
The button appears and shows the count of selected records (e.g., 'Delete 3 Selected') when at least one record is checked.
The button is styled as a destructive action (red/danger color).

file_operations.description: Add a 'Delete Selected' button above the memberships table. Conditionally render it only when selectedIds.length > 0. Display dynamic text showing the count: 'Delete {count} Selected'. Style with destructive/danger variant (red background).

Add a 'Delete Selected' button above the publishing works table. Conditionally render it only when selectedIds.length > 0. Display dynamic text showing the count: 'Delete {count} Selected'. Style with destructive/danger variant (red background).

Add a 'Delete Selected' button above the releases table. Conditionally render it only when selectedIds.length > 0. Display dynamic text showing the count: 'Delete {count} Selected'. Style with destructive/danger variant (red background).

Add a 'Delete Selected' button above the recording projects table. Conditionally render it only when selectedIds.length > 0. Display dynamic text showing the count: 'Delete {count} Selected'. Style with destructive/danger variant (red background).

Add a 'Delete Selected' button above the artist development table. Conditionally render it only when selectedIds.length > 0. Display dynamic text showing the count: 'Delete {count} Selected'. Style with destructive/danger variant (red background).

requirements.summary: Implement confirmation dialog for bulk delete with cancel and confirm options
acceptanceCriteria: A modal confirmation dialog appears after clicking 'Delete Selected'.
The dialog states clearly how many records will be permanently deleted.
The dialog has a 'Confirm Delete' button and a 'Cancel' button.
Clicking 'Cancel' or dismissing the dialog performs no deletion.
Clicking 'Confirm Delete' triggers the deletion flow.

file_operations.description: Create a reusable confirmation dialog component for bulk delete. Accept props for open state, count of records to delete, entity type name (singular/plural), onCancel callback, and onConfirm callback. Render using shadcn/ui Dialog with clear warning text, destructive 'Confirm Delete' button, and secondary 'Cancel' button.

Import and wire BulkDeleteConfirmDialog. Add state to control dialog visibility. When 'Delete Selected' button is clicked, open the confirmation dialog. Pass selectedIds.length as count and 'membership' as entity type.

Import and wire BulkDeleteConfirmDialog. Add state to control dialog visibility. When 'Delete Selected' button is clicked, open the confirmation dialog. Pass selectedIds.length as count and 'publishing work' as entity type.

Import and wire BulkDeleteConfirmDialog. Add state to control dialog visibility. When 'Delete Selected' button is clicked, open the confirmation dialog. Pass selectedIds.length as count and 'release' as entity type.

Import and wire BulkDeleteConfirmDialog. Add state to control dialog visibility. When 'Delete Selected' button is clicked, open the confirmation dialog. Pass selectedIds.length as count and 'recording project' as entity type.

Import and wire BulkDeleteConfirmDialog. Add state to control dialog visibility. When 'Delete Selected' button is clicked, open the confirmation dialog. Pass selectedIds.length as count and 'artist development entry' as entity type.

requirements.summary: Wire confirmation dialog to call backend bulk delete, refresh list, clear selections, and show toast notifications
acceptanceCriteria: After confirming deletion, the selected records are removed from the list without a full page reload.
A success toast notification appears confirming the number of records deleted.
All checkboxes are cleared and the 'Delete Selected' button hides after successful deletion.
If the backend call fails, an error banner is displayed and no records are removed from the UI.
The React Query cache for the affected section is invalidated so the list reflects the latest backend state.

file_operations.description: Add five new mutation hooks using useMutation from React Query: useBulkDeleteMemberships, useBulkDeletePublishingWorks, useBulkDeleteReleases, useBulkDeleteRecordingProjects, and useBulkDeleteArtistDevelopment. Each hook calls the corresponding backend bulk delete function (bulkDeleteMembershipProfiles, bulkDeletePublishingWorks, bulkDeleteReleases, bulkDeleteRecordingProjects, bulkDeleteArtistDevelopment) passing the array of IDs. On success, invalidate the appropriate query key to trigger list refresh.

Import useBulkDeleteMemberships and useToast. Wire the confirmation dialog's onConfirm callback to call the mutation with selectedIds. On success, show a success toast displaying the count of deleted records, clear selectedIds state, and close the dialog. On error, display an ErrorBanner component with the error message.

Import useBulkDeletePublishingWorks and useToast. Wire the confirmation dialog's onConfirm callback to call the mutation with selectedIds. On success, show a success toast displaying the count of deleted records, clear selectedIds state, and close the dialog. On error, display an ErrorBanner component with the error message.

Import useBulkDeleteReleases and useToast. Wire the confirmation dialog's onConfirm callback to call the mutation with selectedIds. On success, show a success toast displaying the count of deleted records, clear selectedIds state, and close the dialog. On error, display an ErrorBanner component with the error message.

Import useBulkDeleteRecordingProjects and useToast. Wire the confirmation dialog's onConfirm callback to call the mutation with selectedIds. On success, show a success toast displaying the count of deleted records, clear selectedIds state, and close the dialog. On error, display an ErrorBanner component with the error message.

Import useBulkDeleteArtistDevelopment and useToast. Wire the confirmation dialog's onConfirm callback to call the mutation with selectedIds. On success, show a success toast displaying the count of deleted records, clear selectedIds state, and close the dialog. On error, display an ErrorBanner component with the error message.
